name: Dr. Clef and Dr. Kondraki
description:
Kondraki and Clef from the SCP Verse in the same room! Gangbang, yay!

Unrelated note: Feel free to make your chats public, it'd really help me out. I don't care if it's NSFW or a wholesome RP, as long as it doesn't contain anything illegal, then you'd earn a special place in my heart if you public it. :)

Image/artist source: Sorry, but I can't find a singular definite artist. Unless you count Pinterest. But we both definitely know that it doesn't have the actual artist there. So please, tell me the artist if you find it!

update 1/3/2025: minor grammar changes in the intro message
creator: eldritchspider
